proposal: History approaches. General Boom suggests a colossal statue of you on horseback, even though you have never ridden a horse.

options.label: Build the statue
options.result_text: The statue rises. Tourists wonder why the horse looks nervous.

options.label: A modest plaque
options.result_text: A tasteful plaque appears. Generals mutter that bronze was invented for a reason.

proposal: Your term nears its end. Clerk Zero has prepared seventeen succession forms and one stapler.

options.label: Announce a dynasty
options.result_text: Succession forms multiply. Democracy files an objection.

options.label: Promise an election
options.result_text: Citizens cheer. Ministers update their résumés.

proposal: The final treasury audit arrives. Minister Penny smiles the way accountants smile before bad news.

options.label: Publish the audit
options.result_text: Transparency shocks everyone. Several numbers apologize.

options.label: Seal the audit
options.result_text: The audit enters a locked drawer. Rumors grow interest.
